heading: Manage AWS IAM Roles
body:
To authorize an AWS IAM role using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas cloudProviders accessRoles aws authorize <roleId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas cloudProviders accessRoles aws authorize](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-cloudProviders-accessRoles-aws-authorize).
